benefits.description: Produces skin tingles and appetite suppression when properly dosed

side_effects.description: Skin tingles present with proper dosing, absent with underdosed vial

protocol_notes: User experienced underdosed vial (labeled 20mg) for 1 month where appetite suppression and skin tingles disappeared, then returned with next vial from same vendor/batch. Recommends 12-week cuts with 8-12 week maintenance breaks to prevent metabolic stalling. Advises weighing calories rather than estimating.
